printed_laminated.note: Orders <10 units billed at $55.00 flat minimum order charge

cut_vinyl.note: Cut vinyl items are NOT subject to MOQ 10 or $55 minimum order charge at this time

concession_phase.note: Relationship Concession phase — Rule 14 deviation acknowledged. All 4 current cut vinyl items priced within this band by design.

ai_consensus.note: Would-be normalized band per AI consensus. Normalization planned January 2027.

cut_vinyl_lettering.calibration_note: Band calibrated at 2.51-2.56 sq ft. Items at significantly different sq ft require validation.

printed_laminated_singles.note: Band anchored at 1230820 ($15.43/sq ft). 1082570 AI-validated at $15.91/sq ft. Band is narrowing.

printed_laminated_kits.note: Per-label parity at $10.00/label qty 20. Kit premium ~6% over singles intentional — matched-set collation, multi-label inspection, controlled-set packaging.

medium.note: Standard full-color process. ~$0.27 at 0.609 sq ft.

flood_coat.placeholder_note: WARNING: $0.25 is an understated placeholder historically used (1210810). Realistic range $0.40-$0.60. Must confirm after first production run.

flood_coat_safety_red.note: Safety Red flood coat. $0.25 used in 1210810 as placeholder — UNVERIFIED. Confirm after first run.

olympic_blue.pms_note: Visual approximation of PMS 2386 C — not a certified Pantone match. Disclose in quote.

do_not_benchmark.1277970: One-off program peer — $55 floor pricing, not a catalog rate
do_not_benchmark.1277980: One-off program peer — $55 floor pricing, not a catalog rate
do_not_benchmark.1277990: One-off program peer — $55 floor pricing, not a catalog rate
do_not_benchmark.1278000: One-off program peer — $55 floor pricing, not a catalog rate
do_not_benchmark.3017583: Standalone one-off — $55 floor pricing, not a catalog rate
do_not_benchmark.3017584: Standalone one-off — $55 floor pricing, not a catalog rate
do_not_benchmark.1210810: Sub-scope single — excluded from band data points until production-volume acceptance
do_not_benchmark.1082570: Initial order was $42 flat job-economics (not a catalog rate). Production tier table is valid for reorder volumes.

quote_language.moq_printed_laminated: Minimum order for printed labels is 10 units. Orders below 10 units are subject to a $55.00 minimum order charge. You will never be invoiced more for a smaller quantity.
quote_language.anchor_line_template: Label measures {width}" × {height}" ({sq_ft} sq ft) in {material} — priced at ${price} at your projected monthly volume.
quote_language.pms_caveat_template: {color} is a visual approximation of {pms_code} — not a certified Pantone match.
quote_language.ink_unverified_note: Ink cost is a placeholder pending first production run. Update material_cost_per_unit after run.
quote_language.sub_scope_note: Dimensional scope exclusion: this item is below the 0.5 sq ft singles band floor. Band-consistent $/sq ft applies. Excluded from band data points until production-volume acceptance confirmed.
quote_language.rule_14_note: Rule 14 deviation: benchmarked against a Relationship Concession item. AI consensus band: ${min}-${max}/sq ft.
